data.name: Hentai Tavern
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Tavern - this is an exciting game in the RPG genre, where you have to try yourself as the owner of the tavern. Try to save your family business and make the tavern truly famous, simultaneously gaining the recognition of beautiful girls.

You got a dilapidated tavern from your grandfather, who has just passed away. The only worker in the tavern is a waiter Cecilia. Shortly you find out that the tavern has many debts left and the things go really bad with it.

Later on Cecilia tells you that your grandpa wasn’t a usual tavern owner, but also an owner of a dungeon with products, where he was getting different resources while killing monsters. However he failed to finish the job so now it’s your turn to try to conquer the dungeon, develop the tavern and get 5 stars of “Muchelin” from a famous organisation to save the tavern and become its rightful owner. Otherwise the lord of the city of Ignacia will get all the rights to this tavern to compensate the debts.

In this game you will have to fight the dungeon monsters and get resources for tavern’s development. For this you will be able to upgrade your skills and abilities, as well as craft the weapons. In the tavern you will find a mini-game in which you will cook for your clients using the products from the dungeon. Apart from that you will meet 6 lovely girls in the game and will be able to develop relationships with them. Complete their tasks and you will be well rewarded!

  • multi-level dungeon system consisting of 100 levels and 10 bosses in between them

  • upgrading skills, weapons and abilities of the hero

  • crafting weapons and making magical items

  • trading (with a trader)

  • mini-games in which you’ll create weapons and cook for the tavern’s clients

  • ability to change tavern’s interior

  • developing relationships with 6 lovely girls

  • 12 “bed” scenes

  • plenty of beautiful ero-cards and arts with game’s characters

data.short_description: Hentai Tavern - this is an exciting game in the RPG genre, where you have to try yourself as the owner of the tavern. Try to save your family business and make the tavern truly famous, simultaneously gaining the recognition of beautiful girls.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 丹麥文, 繁體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 泰文, 烏克蘭文, 捷克文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel(R) HD Graphics 612
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • Processor: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel(R) HD Graphics 612
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
